center.name: 諾曼比島
center.summary: 諾曼比島是巴布亞新幾內亞米爾恩灣省的島嶼，是當特爾卡斯托群島三大島嶼之一，面積1,000平方公里，島上最高點1,158米。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Endemic to Papua New Guinea, the Goldie's bird-of-paradise is distributed in the hill forests of Fergusson and Normanby Island of the D'Entrecasteaux Archipelago, eastern Papuan Islands
